case_title: LINO VASQUEZ VS. JAMES W GORING et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-12-2014 CONTINUED TO APR-23-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LINO VASQUEZ'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 18, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 3, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Continued To Jun-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LINO VASQUEZ'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is continued to June 18, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 3, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
